narrative:
Westerville 2-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 918 registered voters, with 48.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.4%, a clear Republican lean of 6.6 percentage points.
